core_payload.content:
# Capsule Librarian Agent

## Dream Direction
In the Dream branch, Capsule Librarian Agent grows into a richer vault-memory guide with stronger retrieval, branch literacy, archive intelligence, and graph-neighborhood explanation for both users and other agents.

## Future Potential
- clearer graph-neighborhood retrieval and ranking
- stronger duplicate and overlap detection
- better guidance across Real, Dream, and archive contexts
- deeper support for chat grounding and cross-agent memory

## Why It Matters
Dream preserves Librarian as the role that lets a large capsule vault remain navigable instead of turning into sovereign fog.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Librarian Agent in the Dream branch represents a more capable retrieval and vault-literacy layer for N1Hub. It aims toward stronger graph-neighborhood explanation, better archive awareness, and more reliable distinction between Real, Dream, and historical material. The capsule matters because a growing sovereign library needs a first-class guide to remain usable. Dream therefore keeps vault literacy visible as a named intelligence role rather than an accidental side effect of search.
